name: shop_no_ads_premium
description: Premium no-ads / VIP bundle art: the knitted ADS-slash badge wearing a small gold crown, garnished with a paw coin and a crochet hook at its base, richer and more celebratory than the plain badge.
prompt_extra: two-element overlap composition, hint token in front reads largest; same badge design language as the standard no-ads badge

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
